Compounds.Name: Hydroxy-Itraconazole
CalculationMethods: Cellular partition coefficient method - Rodgers and Rowland
Compounds.Description:
Version 1.3

Lipophilicity, fu, Km, Kcat and Ki were adjusted in order to optimally fit to observed concentration-time profiles of Mouton et al. (2006), Barone et al. (1993) as well as to drug interaction studies with midazolam by Olkkola et al. (1994 and 1996) and Backman et al. (1998).

Compounds.Name: Itraconazole

ValueOrigin.Description: Only 2 values available: 1ng/mL @ pH7; 4 ng/mL @ pH 1. Solubility gain per charge was adjusted until these two points are hit!
Only 2 values available: 1ng/mL @ pH7; 4 ng/mL @ pH 1. Solubility gain per charge was adjusted until these two points are hit!
Only 2 values available: 1ng/mL @ pH7; 4 ng/mL @ pH 1. Solubility gain per charge was adjusted until these two points are hit!

CalculationMethods: Cellular partition coefficient method - Rodgers and Rowland
Compounds.Description:
Version 1.3

Lipophilicity, fu, Km, Kcat, Ki, solubility and intestinal permeability were adjusted in order to optimally fit to observed concentration-time profiles of Mouton et al. (2006), Barone et al. (1993) as well as to drug interaction studies with midazolam by Olkkola et al. (1994 and 1996) and Backman et al. (1998).

Compounds.Name: Carbamazepine

Processes.Description: EC50 and Emax values were derived from HepaRG cells

CalculationMethods: Cellular partition coefficient method - Rodgers and Rowland

Compounds.Name: Rifampicin

ValueOrigin.Description: Adjusted due to new data for RIF lower dose - Bayer Study 19604

Processes.Description: A transporter mediated unidirectional transfer of a compound across a cellular membrane is described as saturable process following Michaelis-Menten type kinetics. The corresponding kcat value is calculated from a specific Vmax as input value.

A transporter mediated unidirectional transfer of a compound across a cellular membrane is described as saturable process following Michaelis-Menten type kinetics. The corresponding kcat value is calculated from a specific Vmax as input value.

CalculationMethods: Cellular partition coefficient method - Rodgers and Rowland

Compounds.Name: Levonorgestrel 1

ValueOrigin.Description: Binding kinetics operating in mechanistic mode

Processes.Description: Total hepatic clearance is described as first order process in the liver, which eliminates the compound from plasma. Specific clearance is calculated from plasma clearance as input value. Cliv = 5.79 +/- 2.56 L/h. BW = 60 kg

CalculationMethods: Cellular partition coefficient method - Rodgers and Rowland
